triviaEntries.text: Is the co-artistic director of the NYC Theatre company Strangemen and Co. and co-founded it in 2011 with actor, Jason Ralph.
Was awarded an OBIE in 2016 for the puppet design in his show, The Woodsman.
Graduate from the SUNY Purchase Conservatory of Acting.
Is a performer that also designs and directs puppetry for theatre and opera.
Played and voiced the character of Rocky for Project Hail Mary (2026) and led his team of 4-7 additional puppeteers to bring the character to life on set.
Has coincidentally played two puppet characters named Rocky.
Designed the puppets for the 2022 Broadway revival of Into the Woods, including Milky White, who became a viral sensation as well as the subject of several articles and fan tattoos.
Directed, designed, wrote and performed in 2016's The Woodsman.
